SignIn.title: Admin Console
SignIn.description: Authorized personnel only. Please identify yourself to manage the ecosystem.

SignUp.title: Create Admin Account
SignUp.description: Setup your high-level credentials to initialize the management console.

ForgotPassword.title: Account Recovery
ForgotPassword.description: Lost your access? Provide your registered email, and the system will generate a secure recovery link.

note.title: Note:
note.text: Check your spam folder if you don't receive the email within 2 minutes. The link will be active for exactly 1 hour.

ResetPassword.title: Set New Password
ResetPassword.description: Your identity has been verified. Please choose a strong new password for your account.

Setup.title: Two-Factor Auth
Setup.description: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit verification code to proceed.

Verify.title: Checkpoint
Verify.description: This account is protected by multi-factor authentication. Please enter your code to unlock the session.

Form.labelBackup: Enter one of your 8-character backup codes
Form.lostAccess: Lost access to device? Use backup code

Modal.title: 🛡️ Save Backup Codes
Modal.warning: If you lose your phone, these codes are the only way to access your account. Store them in a password manager.
Modal.footerNote: Once you click, you won't see them again

ChangeForcedPassword.title: Initialize Security
ChangeForcedPassword.description: For security reasons, you must change your temporary password before accessing the admin console.

PasswordStep.title: Update Password
PasswordStep.description: Your account was created with a temporary password. Please set a new secure one.

TwoFactorStep.title: Enable 2FA
TwoFactorStep.description: Scan the QR code to link your authenticator app and secure your admin access.
